name: Schools see huge increase in student-related crashes in Clark County
summary: After an eye-popping 356 percent increase in crashes involving vulnerable school-age road users, Clark County is looking to increase safety for students.

name: Snapshots of Nevada history at UNLV Library
summary: Laboratory works to preserve and restore priceless images

name: Syracuse University and University of Nevada, Las Vegas, Join Forces at Sports, Education and Innovation Conference in Las Vegas
summary: Entertainment and Innovation Conference (SEICon), which is co- hosted by the University of Las Vegas, Nevada and Syracuse University, brought together a broad cross-section of the sports and entertainment industries at the Bellagio.

name: Chefs Say This Is the Secret to Fluffy Rice
summary: Cooking experts share the simple step that changes the texture of your rice.

name: A look into red flag laws and L2K holds in the wake of last week's thwarted mass shooting
summary: Authorities say a possible mass shooting was stopped before it could wreak havoc on the Las Vegas Strip after Allison Howlett was taken into custody following a tense police standoff in the Sunset Station parking lot.The case has also raised questions about how Nevada’s red flag law is triggered, particularly after Julie Howlett said Allison Howlett had been placed on an up to 72-hour hold by the Henderson Police Department days before her arrest.

name: What are data centers? Clark County weighs new regulations
summary: As demand for data centers continues to grow across the country, Clark County commissioners are preparing to discuss whether Southern Nevada should adopt new standards for future developments before more projects are proposed.

name: A family steps in to save the dying casino town of Primm, Nevada
summary: Primm, Nevada, was once a beacon in the desert for travelers driving on Interstate 15 from Southern California to Las Vegas — a family-friendly destination, and the first place to gamble right over the Nevada border. The proliferation of casinos across America, however, has sent the town on a long decline.

name: New research spotlights reproductive and heart health: Dr. Kahn explains
summary: New research is drawing attention to a critical link between women’s reproductive health and long-term heart health, with studies suggesting that some common gynecological conditions may raise the risk of serious cardiovascular problems later in life.

name: Strip casino giants eyeing Wall Street exits as billionaires bet on Las Vegas’ future
summary: When billionaire Tilman Fertitta offered $17.6 billion to take Caesars Entertainment private, industry observers viewed it as a bold move by a longtime casino operator seeking control of one of gaming’s largest companies. Less than one week later, another billionaire made an even bigger bet.
